arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk verdict by Marco Materazzi speaks volumes about Liverpool captain
arts.sum: Marco Materazzi discussed Virgil van Dijk in a conversation about the best defenders both past and present after observing the Liverpool captain's performances from afar

arts.ttl: Yamal: Barça new favourites to win UCL
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has said Barcelona are the new favourites to win the Champions League after Liverpool were knocked out in the round of 16.

arts.ttl: Morata: ‘I should have never left Atletico Madrid for Milan’
arts.sum: Alvaro Morata has admitted he regrets leaving Atletico Madrid for Milan last summer, revealing that...

arts.ttl: Revealed: What Van Dijk and PSG officials really spoke about inside Anfield after Champions League exit
arts.sum: In fact, he's one of three Liverpool stars whose future remains uncertain, with Trent Alexander-Arnold and Mohamed Salah also yet to extend their stays at Anfield beyond this campaign.

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Virgil van Dijk hint dropped as Julian Alvarez transfer stance emerges
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk joins team-mates Mo Salah and Trent Alexnader-Arnold in having entered the last three months of their contracts at Liverpool, with their futures still undecided

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal interview: ‘Sometimes titles slip away unexpectedly’
arts.sum: Barcelona are currently level with Real Madrid at the top of LaLiga and remain in contention for both the Champions League and Copa del Rey. As we approach the final stages of the 2024/25 season, Yamal sat down with AS to talk titles . With a run of eight LaLiga wins on the bounce Barcelona are the in-form team in the league, but the young star isn’t getting carried away.

arts.ttl: Netherlands vs. Spain: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Thursday's Nations League clash between Netherlands and Spain, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk future: Ronald Koeman drops hint on defender's potential destination after links to PSG are rubbished
arts.sum: Netherlands manager Ronald Koeman claims Liverpool defender Virgil van Dijk is not interested in a move to Saudi Arabia this summer.
